---
title: "Multi-Week Engagement Trend"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: false
params:
  student_id: ""
  num_weeks:  8
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 8, fig.height = 5)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

ANALYTICS_HOME <- Sys.getenv("ANALYTICS_HOME", ".")
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "config.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "scripts", "utils.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "analysis", "weekly_trend_analysis.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "scripts", "fetch_data.R"))

student_id <- params$student_id
num_weeks  <- as.integer(params$num_weeks)
trend      <- weekly_trend_analysis(student_id, num_weeks)
student    <- fetch_student(student_id)
```

**Student:** `r student$full_name` (`r student$student_number`)  
**Analysis Period:** Last `r num_weeks` weeks | **Trend:** `r trend$trend_direction`

---

## Concentration Trend

```{r conc-trend}
wdf <- trend$weekly_stats
if (!is.null(wdf) && nrow(wdf) >= 2) {
  ggplot(wdf, aes(x = week_number, y = avg_concentration)) +
    geom_line(colour = "#42A5F5", linewidth = 1.2) +
    geom_point(colour = "#42A5F5", size = 3) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, fill = "#BBDEFB",
                colour = "#0D47A1", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
    labs(x = "Week Number", y = "Avg Concentration Score (0-100)",
         title = sprintf("Concentration Trend — %s", trend$trend_direction),
         subtitle = sprintf("Slope: %.2f pts/week", trend$trend_slope)) +
    theme_minimal()
} else {
  cat("Not enough weekly data to plot a trend.")
}
```

## Attentiveness Over Weeks

```{r attentive-trend}
if (!is.null(wdf) && nrow(wdf) >= 2 &&
    "attentive_percentage" %in% names(wdf)) {
  ggplot(wdf, aes(x = week_number, y = attentive_percentage * 100)) +
    geom_col(fill = "#A5D6A7") +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
    labs(x = "Week Number", y = "Attentive %",
         title = "Weekly Attentiveness Percentage") +
    theme_minimal()
}
```

## Sessions Attended per Week

```{r sessions-attended}
if (!is.null(wdf) && nrow(wdf) > 0) {
  ggplot(wdf, aes(x = week_number, y = sessions_attended)) +
    geom_col(fill = "#90CAF9") +
    labs(x = "Week Number", y = "Sessions Attended",
         title = "Sessions Attended per Week") +
    theme_minimal()
}
```
